summary: Full e2e testing of Invoice Management Dashboard - backend API and frontend UI. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with error object instead of 404 for non-existent invoice

action_items: Minor: /api/invoices/{id} returns 200 with {"error": "Not found"} for missing IDs — should return HTTP 404
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/invoices/{invoice_id} returns HTTP 200 with error body instead of 404 — not RESTful. Fix: raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Not found')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: dashboard KPIs (12 total, $101,300 revenue, 5 paid, 3 overdue), outstanding balance ($74,550), recent invoices grid (10 cards), invoices table (12 rows), search filter (Acme→1 result), status filter (overdue→3 results), nav active states. Backend 7/7 tests pass. Only minor issue: 404 not returned for missing invoice IDs.
